evals.name: remote-pr-ingest-then-pending-review
evals.expected_output: Resolves REMOTE mode (PR number). Fetches the diff ONCE in the main loop (gh pr view/diff). Gathers two lenses: invokes gusto-dev:pr-risk --fast, and INGESTS fresh-eyes by fetching the bot's comment, extracting the findings.json link, WebFetching and parsing it (NOT mimicking, since the bot already ran). Merges/dedupes by (file,line), drops confidence:low and introduced_by_pr:false, tiers Critical/Important/Suggestion/Strengths, caps issues at ~5. Runs the triage loop asking post/skip/edit per finding, drafting comments in Monica's plain voice. Assembles ONE PENDING GitHub review from approved comments and leaves it pending (does NOT submit). Never posts without approval.

evals.name: local-self-review-mimics-fresh-eyes
evals.expected_output: Resolves LOCAL mode. Fetches the diff via git diff main...HEAD. Invokes gusto-dev:pr-risk --fast on the branch. For fresh-eyes, MIMICS by Glob .fresh-eyes/checks/*.md at the repo root and dispatching read-only subagents (Read/Grep/Glob) that receive the diff text + check content + the JSON output contract and return ONLY a JSON array of findings. Subagents never call gh. Merges/tiers, runs triage, and prints a terminal report. Nothing is posted (local mode).

evals.name: practice-mode-swing-then-sharpen
evals.expected_output: Enters PRACTICE mode. For each notable hunk it shows the hunk and asks Monica for HER read FIRST, without revealing what the lenses flagged. After she commits, it grades point-by-point (right/wrong/sharpen) against the merged findings, surfaces what she missed and why it matters, then moves on. Afterward it offers to turn confirmed findings into draft comments. Does not dump all findings up front.

evals.name: bot-not-posted-falls-back-to-mimic
evals.expected_output: Remote mode, but the fresh-eyes bot comment is absent (review still pending). The skill detects no findings.json link and FALLS BACK to the mimic path (Glob .fresh-eyes/checks/*.md + subagents) so Monica isn't blocked, rather than failing or skipping the fresh-eyes lens entirely. pr-risk --fast still runs. Triage proceeds normally.

evals.name: pattern-capture-asks-before-codifying
evals.expected_output: After the review session, a recurring move emerged (e.g. Monica kept checking whether backend scoring changes need UI updates). The skill NAMES the pattern and ASKS whether to codify it, routing a workflow pattern to SKILL.md or a team/domain rule to references/usp-conventions.md. It never edits either file without explicit confirmation.
